sql_reader_query.value: @concat('SELECT * FROM ', coalesce(item().schema, 'dbo'), '.', coalesce(item().table_name, 'default_table'), ' WHERE env = ''', pipeline().parameters.env, ''' AND merge_strategy = ''', coalesce(variables('selected_strategy'), pipeline().parameters.merge_strategy), '''')

@concat('SELECT ''', coalesce(item().strategy, 'default'), ''' AS strategy, ', coalesce(item().total, '0'), ' AS total_records, ''', coalesce(item().env, pipeline().parameters.env), ''' AS environment FROM ', pipeline().parameters.config_table_a, ' UNION ALL SELECT ''', coalesce(item().strategy, 'default'), ''', ', coalesce(item().total, '0'), ', ''', coalesce(item().env, pipeline().parameters.env), ''' FROM ', pipeline().parameters.config_table_b)

value.value: @concat('WHERE batch_id = ''',replace(coalesce(pipeline().parameters.batch_id,'NO_BATCH'),'-','_'),''' AND source_system = ''',if(equals(pipeline().parameters.env,'prod'),replace(join(split(coalesce(pipeline().parameters.source_system,'UNKNOWN'),'_'),'.'),'ERP','ENTERPRISE'),replace(join(split(coalesce(pipeline().parameters.source_system,'DEV_UNKNOWN'),'_'),'-'),'ERP','TEST')),''' AND run_date >= ''',formatDateTime(coalesce(pipeline().parameters.run_date,pipeline().parameters.fallback_date),'yyyy-MM-dd'),''' AND region IN (''',replace(join(split(coalesce(pipeline().parameters.region,'us-east-1'),'-'),''','''),'-','_'),''')')

sql_reader_query.value: @concat('SELECT * FROM ',if(equals(pipeline().parameters.env,'prod'),concat('[',replace(join(split(coalesce(pipeline().parameters.source_system,'dbo'),'_'),'].[')),'].[',replace(coalesce(pipeline().parameters.batch_id,'default'),'_',''),']'),concat('[dev_',replace(join(split(coalesce(pipeline().parameters.source_system,'dbo'),'_'),'_dev_')),'].[',replace(coalesce(pipeline().parameters.batch_id,'dev_default'),'_',''),']')),' ',variables('query_filter'),' AND target_system = ''',replace(join(split(coalesce(pipeline().parameters.target_system,'UNKNOWN_TGT'),'_'),'-'),'-','_'),''' AND effective_date = ''',formatDateTime(coalesce(pipeline().parameters.run_date,pipeline().parameters.fallback_date),'yyyy-MM-dd'),''' ORDER BY ',if(equals(pipeline().parameters.debug_mode,'true'),'created_at DESC','id ASC'))

pipelines.description: LLM pipeline: nested_expression_stress_maximum_depth (Maximum depth nesting combining if(), concat(), replace(), formatDateTime(), coalesce(), split(), join() in single expressions)

value.value: @concat('WHERE batch_id = ''',replace(coalesce(pipeline().parameters.batch_id,'NO_BATCH'),'-','_'),''' AND source_system = ''',if(equals(pipeline().parameters.env,'prod'),replace(join(split(coalesce(pipeline().parameters.source_system,'UNKNOWN'),'_'),'.'),'ERP','ENTERPRISE'),replace(join(split(coalesce(pipeline().parameters.source_system,'DEV_UNKNOWN'),'_'),'-'),'ERP','TEST')),''' AND run_date >= ''',formatDateTime(coalesce(pipeline().parameters.run_date,pipeline().parameters.fallback_date),'yyyy-MM-dd'),''' AND region IN (''',replace(join(split(coalesce(pipeline().parameters.region,'us-east-1'),'-'),''','''),'-','_'),''')')

sql_reader_query.value: @concat('SELECT * FROM ',if(equals(pipeline().parameters.env,'prod'),concat('[',replace(join(split(coalesce(pipeline().parameters.source_system,'dbo'),'_'),'].[')),'].[',replace(coalesce(pipeline().parameters.batch_id,'default'),'_',''),']'),concat('[dev_',replace(join(split(coalesce(pipeline().parameters.source_system,'dbo'),'_'),'_dev_')),'].[',replace(coalesce(pipeline().parameters.batch_id,'dev_default'),'_',''),']')),' ',variables('query_filter'),' AND target_system = ''',replace(join(split(coalesce(pipeline().parameters.target_system,'UNKNOWN_TGT'),'_'),'-'),'-','_'),''' AND effective_date = ''',formatDateTime(coalesce(pipeline().parameters.run_date,pipeline().parameters.fallback_date),'yyyy-MM-dd'),''' ORDER BY ',if(equals(pipeline().parameters.debug_mode,'true'),'created_at DESC','id ASC'))
